sections.paragraph:
verb לרמות

to cheat, swindle, deceive, lie, trick

verb רומה

be cheated, swindled, deceived

verb להרים

to raise, lift; pick up; donate; remove; (Slang) screw, have sex; steal

verb הורם

be raised, lifted; picked up; be donated; be removed; (Slang) be screwed; be stolen

verb לרמות (>>רימה)

to cheat, swindle, deceive, lie, trick

adjective

high, lofty, loud, earsplitting, soaring; exalted, supreme; supra-

God (the most high)
